product_overview: WHITELINEZ is a real-time AI traffic monitoring platform and prediction game where users watch a live HLS camera, submit vehicle-count guesses for short rounds (1/3/5 minutes), and earn points for correct or close guesses. The frontend is a Vite-built Vanilla JS app with Supabase realtime, chat, and leaderboards.
core_goals: Provide a low-latency live video stream with AI overlays and real-time vehicle counts.
Enable users to submit and track short-window vehicle-count guesses (1/3/5 minutes) and receive clear scoring feedback.
Expose public social features (leaderboard, chat, banners) to increase engagement and retention.
Offer admin tools for camera/round/banner management and ML job control.
Support authenticated and guest access with clear account and history pages for tracked users.

features.name: Live Stream
features.description: Auto-playing HLS video of the active traffic camera with FPS and offline overlays, and smooth camera switch animation.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> See live HLS video stream auto-playing on page load -> See FPS badge overlay on stream -> See detection zone overlay drawn on stream
Navigate to / -> Browser requests /api/token -> /api/token returns error -> See "SIGNAL LOST" overlay on the stream -> See fallback UI indicating stream unavailable

features.name: Vehicle Count Widget
features.description: Floating widget showing real-time vehicle counts via WebSocket; supports global and guess-mode progress displays and mobile expand/collapse.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> See live vehicle count updating in real-time in floating widget -> Tap widget on mobile to expand -> See expanded count and controls
Navigate to / -> WebSocket /ws/live disconnects -> See vehicle count stop updating -> See stale or disconnected indicator on widget

features.name: Guess Panel (Live Bet)
features.description: UI to select a time window (1/3/5 min), enter an exact vehicle-count guess, submit while a round is active, and receive an active receipt and scoring card after round resolution.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Click LOGIN button in nav -> Enter email field -> Enter password field -> Click Login button -> See avatar and balance appear in nav -> View current active round with time remaining in guess panel -> Enter a vehicle count guess in the input field -> Click Submit Guess button -> See active guess receipt with status -> Wait for round to resolve -> See EXACT / CLOSE / MISS scoring card

Navigate to / -> View current active round with time remaining in guess panel -> Enter a non-numeric value in the input field -> Click Submit Guess button -> See validation error message preventing submission

features.name: Leaderboard
features.description: Public leaderboard with 1MIN/3MIN/5MIN tabs showing ranked users and scores, lazy-loading on demand and supporting manual refresh.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Click Leaderboard tab to open -> Click 3MIN tab -> Click refresh button to reload scores -> See ranked list of users with points
Navigate to / -> Click Leaderboard tab to open -> API GET for bets returns error -> See leaderboard error state message and retry affordance

features.name: Public Chat
features.description: Real-time Supabase Realtime chat pane where users post messages that appear instantly and generate activity feed overlays on the stream.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Type a message in the chat input -> Press Enter to send -> See message appear in real-time in chat panel and activity feed overlay
Navigate to / -> Supabase realtime channel disconnects -> Type a message in the chat input -> Press Enter to send -> See send failure message and transient offline indicator

features.name: Camera Switcher
features.description: Modal-driven camera selection with FPS badges allowing users to switch active AI camera streams and see a stream-switch animation.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Click camera tile/icon to open camera selection modal -> See list of available cameras with FPS badges -> Click a camera to switch the stream -> See stream switching overlay animation -> See new camera stream playing with updated FPS badge

Navigate to / -> Click camera tile/icon to open camera selection modal -> Click a camera whose backend token request fails -> See stream switching overlay animation -> See "SIGNAL LOST" overlay and error message for that camera

features.name: User Authentication
features.description: Supabase-based auth supporting login, register, Google OAuth, Continue as Guest, and logout; displays avatar and balance on successful login.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Click LOGIN button in nav to open auth modal -> Click Register tab -> Fill registration fields -> Click Register -> See avatar and balance appear in nav after successful account creation
Navigate to / -> Click LOGIN button in nav to open auth modal -> Enter email field -> Enter password field -> Click Login button -> See authentication error message for invalid credentials

features.name: Detection Zone Overlay
features.description: Canvas polygon overlay showing the AI detection zone, hover highlights, crosshair cursor, and real-time detection boxes drawn from live data.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> See polygon zone drawn over stream canvas -> Hover over zone -> See glow highlight and crosshair cursor -> See detection boxes drawn around detected vehicles
Navigate to / -> Switch camera via camera switcher -> Detection zone fails to load for new camera -> See empty overlay area and a reload affordance

features.name: Gov Analytics Overlay
features.description: Authenticated overlay with Chart.js charts, live data, and CSV export for agency analytics and snapshots.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Click Gov Analytics button to open overlay -> See analytics tab with Chart.js charts -> Click export to download CSV
Navigate to / -> Click Gov Analytics button to open overlay -> Chart.js lazy-load fails on first open -> See blank charts -> Close overlay -> Reopen overlay -> See charts rendered

features.name: Account Page
features.description: Authenticated page at /account.html showing user profile, current balance, bet/guess history, and win/loss breakdown.
user_flows: Navigate to /account.html -> If not authenticated, see auth modal prompting login -> After login, reload /account.html -> See current balance displayed -> See guess/bet history list with outcomes
Navigate to /account.html -> API GET for bets returns error -> See error message on history panel and empty state guidance

features.name: Admin Dashboard
features.description: Admin-only /admin.html for system health, creating/managing rounds, camera/configuration, banner management, ML job control, and user roles.
user_flows: Navigate to /admin.html -> Authenticate as admin -> See system health panel (AI loop, round resolver, bet resolver status) -> Create/manage bet rounds -> Configure camera streams and detection zones -> Trigger ML training job
Navigate to /admin.html -> Authenticate as non-admin user -> See access denied or missing admin controls message

features.name: Banner System & How It Works Modal
features.description: Promotional banner tiles on the main page with play/info tiles that open a How It Works modal; banners are managed in real-time by admins.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> See promotional banner tiles on the main page -> Click Play tile -> See How It Works modal open with game explanation -> Click close to dismiss modal
Navigate to / -> Admin updates banners via /admin.html -> Realtime update fails to reach clients -> See stale banner content on main page and a small update indicator

tech_stack.ui_library: Custom CSS (main.css 11k+ lines), HLS.js, Supabase JS SDK v2

routes.description: Main dashboard — live stream, vehicle count widget, guess panel, leaderboard, chat
User account page — profile, balance, bet history
Admin dashboard — camera management, round control, ML jobs, banners, zones

features.name: Live Stream
features.description: HLS video stream of a live traffic camera feed with offline overlay
user_interactions: View live HLS video stream auto-playing on page load
See FPS badge overlay on stream
See "SIGNAL LOST" overlay when stream is offline

features.name: Vehicle Count Widget
features.description: Floating count widget showing real-time vehicle counts from WebSocket
user_interactions: See live vehicle count updating in real-time
Tap widget on mobile to expand/collapse
See progress bar in guess mode (X/Y vehicles)

features.name: Guess Panel (Live Bet)
features.description: Users guess how many vehicles will pass in a 1/3/5 minute window
user_interactions: View current active round with time remaining
Enter a vehicle count guess in the input field
Click Submit Guess button
See EXACT / CLOSE / MISS scoring card
View active guess receipt with status

features.name: Leaderboard
features.description: Public leaderboard showing top guessers per time window
user_interactions: Click Leaderboard tab to open
Switch between 1MIN / 3MIN / 5MIN window tabs
Click refresh button to reload scores
See ranked list of users with points

features.name: Public Chat
features.description: Real-time public chat with stream activity overlay
user_interactions: Type a message in the chat input
Press Enter or click Send to post
See messages appear in real-time from other users
See activity feed overlaid on stream

features.name: Camera Switcher
features.description: Switch between multiple AI traffic cameras
user_interactions: Click camera tile/icon to open camera selection modal
See list of available cameras with FPS badges
Click a camera to switch the stream
See stream switching overlay animation

features.name: User Authentication
features.description: Login, register, guest access via Supabase Auth
user_interactions: Click LOGIN button in nav to open auth modal
Enter email and password to log in
Click Register tab to create an account
Click Continue as Guest for anonymous access
See avatar and balance appear in nav on login
Click logout to sign out

features.name: Detection Zone Overlay
features.description: Canvas polygon overlay showing AI detection zones on the stream
user_interactions: See polygon zone drawn over stream canvas
Hover over zone to see glow highlight and crosshair
See detection boxes drawn around detected vehicles

features.name: Gov Analytics Overlay
features.description: Government/agency analytics panel with charts and data export
user_interactions: Click Gov Analytics button to open overlay
View analytics tab with Chart.js charts
View live data tab
Click export to download CSV
Browse agencies tab

features.name: Account Page
features.description: User profile, balance history, and guess history
user_interactions: View current balance
See bet/guess history list
View win/loss breakdown

features.name: Admin Dashboard
features.description: Admin-only panel for managing cameras, rounds, ML jobs, banners
user_interactions: View system health (AI loop, round resolver, bet resolver status)
Create/manage bet rounds
Configure camera streams and zones
Manage banners and promotions
Trigger ML training jobs
Assign user roles

known_limitations.issue: Stream requires Railway backend to be live; if /api/token fails the stream won't load (non-fatal after fix)
known_limitations.impact: Stream video unavailable when backend is down; rest of page still loads

known_limitations.issue: Gov analytics overlay uses Chart.js lazy-loaded; may show blank on first open
known_limitations.impact: User may need to close and reopen panel

known_limitations.issue: Dev server limits TestSprite to 15 concurrent tests
